name: DMR Flat View Schema
description: Column reference for the dmr-cars-flat and dmr-vehicles-flat ES|QL views. Activate when writing ES|QL against these views — for column names, types, valid values, and what the columns mean in plain English.
content:
Load this skill when writing ES|QL against dmr-cars-flat or dmr-vehicles-flat to look up column names, valid values, expected ranges, and rich row-level vehicle detail fields. The flat views have data quality guards baked in — no additional guards needed in your query.

IMPORTANT: If FROM dmr-cars-flat returns index_not_found_exception, the flat views have NOT been created yet. Switch immediately to FROM dmr-raw-000002 and load the dmr-esql-patterns skill for field paths. Do NOT retry the flat view.

referenced_content.name: flat-schema
referenced_content.content:
STATUS: Flat views require creation with npm run create:views:flat. If unavailable, use dmr-raw-000002 with the dmr-esql-patterns field-shortcuts.

VIEWS:
  dmr-cars-flat — registered passenger cars (Personbil + Registreret).
  dmr-vehicles-flat — all registered vehicles. Use when scope includes vans, trucks, motorcycles, or all vehicle categories.
  dmr-cars-all-flat — ALL passenger cars regardless of status (Registreret + Afmeldt + UnderUdarbejdelse + null). USE THIS for lifecycle, write-off, salvage, deregistration, totalskadet/totalskadede/skadet/Mangel questions — dmr-cars-flat hides ~99.99 % of write-offs because they are deregistered.

VIEW SELECTION RULE:
  - "How many cars are X right now" / current fleet question → dmr-cars-flat.
  - "How many cars have ever been X" / lifecycle / write-off / Totalskadet / Mangel / deregistration / oldest cars / extinct brands → dmr-cars-all-flat (or dmr-raw-000002 if you need null-status records too).
  - Add WHERE registration_status == "Registreret" on dmr-cars-all-flat when you only want current cars; the column is exposed for explicit filtering.

CORE IDENTIFIERS / DESIGNATION:
  plate — Licence plate / registration number. Use exact matching for plate lookup.
  vehicle_id — Internal DMR KoeretoejIdent. Show as raw digits; do not add separators.
  vin — VIN / chassis number. OK to show for exact plate lookup responses in this project.
  vehicle_category — DMR vehicle category, e.g. Personbil, Varebil, Lastbil, Motorcykel.
  registration_status — Registration status. Values: Registreret (active), Afmeldt (deregistered), UnderUdarbejdelse (in-process), null (pre-DMR or type-approval-only). Pre-filtered to Registreret on dmr-cars-flat / dmr-vehicles-flat; exposed for explicit filtering on dmr-cars-all-flat.
  brand — Brand name. Usually uppercase, but some newer brands are mixed-case. Use TO_UPPER(brand) for case-insensitive matching.
  model — Model name.
  vehicle_type — EU/type-approval type name, distinct from vehicle_category.
  variant — Model/type-approval variant name.
  manufacturer — Manufacturer/fabricant, distinct from displayed brand.

REGISTRATION / CATEGORICAL:
  fuel — Primary fuel. Values include El, Benzin, Diesel, El/benzin, Brint, Gas, Andre.
  color — Exterior colour. Ukendt means unknown/unrecorded.
  body_style — Body type. NULL is common; add WHERE body_style IS NOT NULL for clean breakdowns.
  usage — Registered use category, e.g. Privat personkørsel, Taxikørsel, Udlejning Uden Fører, Beboelse, Særlig anvendelse.

DATES / YEARS:
  year — First registration year.
  first_reg_date — First registration date. Date strings need double quotes.
  model_year — Model year; may differ from registration year.
  registration_status_date — Date when registration status was set/changed.
  inspection_date — Date of most recent stored inspection.
  inspection_status_date — Date of latest inspection status.
  lease_start_date / lease_end_date — Leasing validity dates when known.
  permit_start_date / permit_end_date — Permit validity dates when recorded.

TECHNICAL NUMERIC (NULL = missing/corrupt/out-of-range, already guarded):
  power_kw — Engine power in kW. Valid range 1-750. hp = kW * 1.36.
  speed_kmh — Certified top speed in km/h. Valid range 50-400.
  kerb_kg — Minimum kerb/running-order weight in kg. Valid range 300-5000.
  max_kerb_kg — Raw maximum kerb/running-order weight in kg. Sanity-filter before rankings or averages.
  gross_kg — Gross vehicle weight in kg. Valid range 300-10000.
  own_kg — Own/empty vehicle weight in kg. Valid range 300-5000.
  technical_gross_kg — Raw technically allowed total weight in kg. Sanity-filter before rankings or averages.
  gross_combination_kg — Raw total permitted vehicle+trailer combination weight in kg. Sanity-filter before rankings or averages.
  towing_kg — Braked towing capacity in kg. Valid range 1-5000.
  unbraked_towing_kg — Unbraked towing capacity in kg. Valid range 1-5000.
  doors — Door count. Valid range 2-6.
  seats — Minimum seat count. Valid range 1-9.
  max_seats — Raw maximum seat count. Sanity-filter before rankings or averages.
  axles — Axle count. Valid range 1-10.
  gears — Gear count. Valid range 1-12.
  wheelbase_mm — Wheelbase in mm. Valid range 1500-4500.
  front_track_mm / rear_track_mm — Raw track width in mm. Sanity-filter before rankings or averages.
  cylinders — Engine cylinder count. 0 may mean electric.
  displacement_cc — Engine displacement in cc. 0 for EVs.

ENVIRONMENT / EFFICIENCY:
  co2_gkm — CO2 emissions in g/km from the primary fuel entry. Never derive CO2 from fuel economy.
  specific_co2_gkm — Raw KoeretoejMiljoeOplysningSpecifikCO2Emission. Usually g/km but unit can vary by record — sanity check before reporting.
  nox_emission — Raw NOx emission value. Unit depends on the underlying DMR measurement norm.
  co_emission — Raw carbon monoxide emission value. Unit depends on the underlying DMR measurement norm.
  hc_plus_nox_emission — Raw combined HC + NOx emission value.
  pm_emission — Raw particulate (PM) emission value. Most populated on older diesel records.
  measurement_norm — WLTP/NEDC measurement standard.
  emission_norm — Compatibility alias for measurement_norm. Do not use as Euro class.
  euro_norm — Euro/environmental emissions norm/class.
  particle_filter — Diesel particle-filter registry flag.
  km_per_liter — ICE fuel economy only, range 1-30.
  km_per_liter_ev — Energy-equivalent km/L for all cars, range 10-200.

ODOMETER:
  odometer_km_raw — Raw latest inspection odometer value from SynResultatStruktur. Unit/scaling is unverified and values can be corrupt.
  inspection_odometer_km_sane — Same source, only populated for conservative sane values 0-1000000.
  engine_odometer_km_raw — Raw odometer value from the vehicle engine structure. Unit/scaling is unverified.
  engine_odometer_km_sane — Engine odometer, only populated for conservative sane values 0-1000000.
  engine_odometer_documented — Raw registry flag for odometer documentation.
  engine_odometer_unavailable — Raw registry flag for odometer unavailable.
  Use raw odometer values only for exact lookup explanations. For rankings/averages, use the sane helper fields and state that they are conservative filters.

PERMITS / RESTRICTIONS / EQUIPMENT / NOISE:
  permit_type — Raw permit/exemption/coupling-permission type label; may be multi-value.
  permit_comment — Raw permit comment; may be multi-value.
  blocking_reason — Raw administrative blocking/restriction reason. Known values: Totalskadet køretøj (write-off, ~562k cars), Skadet køretøj (damaged, ~21k), Mangel (defect, ~20k), Køretøjet er blokeret (~12k), Indkaldt til registrering (~531), Henvist til SKAT (~172). May be multi-value. Distinct from is_accident_damaged (Trafikskade flag). CRITICAL SCOPE WARNING: ~99.99 % of write-offs (Totalskadet/Skadet/Mangel) are on Afmeldt records — they are invisible on dmr-cars-flat. Use dmr-cars-all-flat or dmr-raw-000002 for write-off questions.
  vehicle_condition — Raw KoeretoejOplysningKoeretoejstand. Vehicle condition/state from customs/import/registration workflows.
  record_created_from — Raw KoeretoejOplysningOprettetUdFra. Indicates how the DMR record was created — useful for import / re-import / forensic analysis.
  tyres_rims — Raw approved wheel/rim/tyre text/list.
  other_equipment — Raw other equipment text/list.
  standing_noise_db — Raw stationary noise value, commonly dB(A). Sanity-filter before rankings or averages.
  driving_noise_db — Raw drive-by noise value, commonly dB(A). Sanity-filter before rankings or averages.
  standing_noise_rpm — Raw RPM for stationary noise test. Sanity-filter before rankings or averages.

FLAGS / STATUS:
  awd — Driven axle count. 1 = FWD/RWD. 2 = AWD/4WD. NULL = corrupt values filtered out. Use awd == 2 for AWD, never awd >= 2.
  towing_capable — Registry flag for towing/coupling capability.
  is_leased — TRUE if lease_start_date is present. If lease_end_date is in the past, describe it as historical leasing, not current leasing.
  is_veteran — TRUE if car has DMR veteran flag.
  is_accident_damaged — Registry Trafikskade boolean. TRUE = the vehicle has a reported traffic-damage event recorded in DMR. NOT a type-approval flag. NOT similar to taxi_suitable or ncap_tested. ~5.5k passenger cars total; ~3.9k currently registered. Never say accident-damaged unless this is true. Never describe it as a certification or repair-qualification flag.
  taxi_suitable — TYPE-APPROVAL flag, not current taxi use. Use usage == "Taxikørsel" for actual taxis.
  ncap_tested — Registry/type-approval NCAP test flag.

INSPECTION:
  inspection_result — Latest stored inspection outcome. Passed: Godkendt. Conditional: KanGodkendesVedOmsynAfOmsynsvirksomhed or KanGodkendesVedOmsynAfSynsvirksomhed. Failed: IkkeGodkendt or IkkeGodkendtKanGenfremstilles. Incomplete: IkkeFuldstaendigtSyn.
  inspection_type — Latest inspection type.
  inspection_status — Latest inspection status.

ROW-LEVEL RESPONSE GUARDS:
  Include Top speed when speed_kmh is present in exact plate lookup responses.
  If a field is NULL in exact plate lookup results, say it is not recorded instead of inferring from nearby columns.
  vehicle_type is a type-approval code/name, not color or usage. Never substitute it for missing color.
  Beboelse means residential/living use, not private use.
  Report towing_kg and unbraked_towing_kg as capacities; phrase towing_capable separately if it conflicts.
  For permits and restrictions, report raw labels/dates/comments and avoid legal conclusions.

CRITICAL: dmr-cars-flat IS ALREADY FILTERED to registered Personbil. Never add WHERE filters for registration status or vehicle category on dmr-cars-flat. For other vehicle categories, use dmr-vehicles-flat. For ALL-status / lifecycle / write-off questions on cars, use dmr-cars-all-flat — dmr-cars-flat hides almost every Totalskadet/Mangel/Skadet record.

EXACT PLATE LOOKUP PATTERN:
  FROM dmr-cars-flat | WHERE plate IN ("AU36042", "EL41783") | KEEP plate, vehicle_id, vin, brand, model, variant, vehicle_type, manufacturer, year, first_reg_date, model_year, fuel, color, body_style, usage, power_kw, speed_kmh, cylinders, displacement_cc, gears, awd, kerb_kg, gross_kg, max_kerb_kg, own_kg, technical_gross_kg, gross_combination_kg, wheelbase_mm, front_track_mm, rear_track_mm, doors, seats, max_seats, axles, towing_capable, towing_kg, unbraked_towing_kg, co2_gkm, specific_co2_gkm, nox_emission, co_emission, hc_plus_nox_emission, pm_emission, measurement_norm, emission_norm, euro_norm, particle_filter, km_per_liter, km_per_liter_ev, inspection_result, inspection_date, inspection_type, inspection_status, inspection_status_date, odometer_km_raw, inspection_odometer_km_sane, engine_odometer_km_raw, engine_odometer_km_sane, engine_odometer_documented, engine_odometer_unavailable, permit_type, permit_start_date, permit_end_date, permit_comment, blocking_reason, vehicle_condition, record_created_from, tyres_rims, other_equipment, standing_noise_db, driving_noise_db, standing_noise_rpm, is_leased, lease_start_date, lease_end_date, is_veteran, is_accident_damaged, taxi_suitable, ncap_tested | SORT plate ASC

EXAMPLE QUERIES:
  -- Electric cars by brand
  FROM dmr-cars-flat | WHERE fuel == "El" | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY brand | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 15

  -- Highest sane inspection odometer values
  FROM dmr-cars-flat | WHERE inspection_odometer_km_sane IS NOT NULL | SORT inspection_odometer_km_sane DESC | KEEP plate, brand, model, inspection_odometer_km_sane, inspection_date | LIMIT 10

  -- Euro/environmental norm distribution
  FROM dmr-cars-flat | WHERE euro_norm IS NOT NULL | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY euro_norm | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 20

  -- Vehicles with recorded permits
  FROM dmr-cars-flat | WHERE permit_type IS NOT NULL | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY permit_type | SORT count DESC | LIMIT 20

  -- Write-off / Totalskadet / Mangel / Skadet — MUST use dmr-cars-all-flat
  FROM dmr-cars-all-flat | WHERE blocking_reason == "Totalskadet køretøj" | STATS count = COUNT(*) BY brand | SORT count DESC | KEEP brand, count | LIMIT 15

  -- Write-off distribution (registered vs deregistered breakdown)
  FROM dmr-cars-all-flat | WHERE blocking_reason IS NOT NULL | STATS total = COUNT(*), still_reg = COUNT(*) WHERE registration_status == "Registreret", dereg = COUNT(*) WHERE registration_status == "Afmeldt" BY blocking_reason | SORT total DESC | LIMIT 10

  -- Towing capacity by brand
  FROM dmr-cars-flat | WHERE towing_kg IS NOT NULL | STATS avg_towing_kg = ROUND(AVG(towing_kg), 0), count = COUNT(*) BY brand | WHERE count >= 100 | SORT avg_towing_kg DESC | LIMIT 20
